case_title: HOPKINS, KAREN et al vs. VIRGUS COMPUTER SYSTEMS INTERNATIONAL, INC et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOPKINS, KAREN TIEMANN, JUDY ENGELE, BRENDA AS TO DEFENDANT VIRGUS COMPUTER SYSTEMS INTERNATIONAL, INC ASSEMBLY FAB, INC
